creator: pawel@FreeBSD.org
text:
State Changed
From-To: open->feedback

Build fails here because devel/doxygen is needed to build reference 
docs.  http://people.freebsd.org/~pawel/buildlogs/libgta-1.0.4.log 

For doxygen generated documentation we have additional knob - DOXYGEN 
which should be off by default as devel/doxygen have many dependencies 
and it's hard to excuse building lots of ports just for documentation. 

Be sure to check that plist works when options are on and off. With your 
latest patch plist will be wrong when DOCS options is set to off. I 
suggest to use PORTDOCS variable for DOCS and DOXYGEN - this will make 
plist smaller and more manageable.
